narrative:
Olive Township has 2,123 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
